title: Project — Everyday Conversations
topics: small talk · phone · email · requests · opinions
description: Projekt: 6 každodenních konverzačních situací. Combines grammar and vocabulary from lessons 01–14.
notes: \n ✓ Great work! Read it aloud and focus on natural rhythm.
tasks: 1. Practise each of the 6 situations by reading both roles aloud
2. Rewrite the 'Expressing opinion' dialogue using a different topic
3. Write a formal email requesting information about a product or service
